title: Train design improvements
description: Mod made mainly for our minecraft  but you can use it too! Now you can have better detailed you train station or trains in minecraft! Btw all custom models are my own,
body:
## NO UPDATES IN FUTURE
Mod made mainly for our minecraft server but you can use it too! This mod adds logos of some european train companies, these can be put on you train. Now you have working ticket machine wich gives you ticket. Or you don't have enough light, solved with ours lamp.
